g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the pitch deck workflow generate the .pptx?')
sendPrompt('How does the ads campaign activation gate work?')
sendPrompt('How does the social media workflow post to X and WhatsApp?')
sendPrompt('What does the case studies workflow output?')
sendPrompt('How does the X API integration post to @nanowork?')
sendPrompt('Which Claude model is used and how are prompts structured?')

g.text: manual retry · clears DL on success
